Introduction
    The second part of the "Chihayafuru" trilogy following the Karuta tournament in Tokyo. Chihaya's team is ready for the national competition. However, she is disappointed to hear that her childhood best friend has quit the game.

Filming locations: Awara onsen station, Awara, Ishikawa, Japan
